meta.name: LILLY Screen Specifications
meta.description: Machine-readable screen/page definitions for LILLY. Each screen describes its route, layout, components used, data requirements, and user interactions. Maps to SvelteKit file-based routes.
meta.path_convention: All file paths are relative to the frontend/ package root (e.g. src/routes/ means frontend/src/routes/ in the monorepo).
meta.i18n_note: All user-facing strings in this file (labels, titles, descriptions shown to users) are German (de-DE) placeholder examples. In implementation, replace them with Paraglide.js i18n keys — do not hardcode these strings.
meta.section_schema: Each section uses 'component' (string|null) for the primary component. If a section composes multiple components, 'includes' (string[]) lists all contained components. 'repeat' is always an object: { kind: 'fixed', count: N } for a known number of instances, or { kind: 'dynamic', per: '<entity>' } for data-driven repetition.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Main landing page after login. Shows collection overview, recent activity, and trade suggestions at a glance.

layout.desktop: Two-column layout: stats + recent activity (left), trade matches + quick actions (right)

sections.content: Greeting with user display name and date. 'Willkommen zurück, {name}!'

sections.layout: Horizontal scroll on mobile, 4-column grid on desktop

sections.description: One progress bar per series the user collects. Ordered by completion percentage descending.
Top 3 trade matches based on matching algorithm. 'Tausch-Vorschläge' header with 'Alle anzeigen' link.
Timeline of recent actions: issues added, trades completed, messages received. Max 10 items.

collection.title: Meine Sammlung
collection.description: Full collection view with filtering, sorting, and the primary cover grid. This is where collectors spend most of their time.

sections.description: Series selector, status chips, condition range, sort, inline search

interactions.tap_card: Opens IssueDetailSheet for the tapped issue
interactions.long_press: Enters multi-select mode for batch operations (mobile)

fab.label: Hefte hinzufügen
fab.style: Brand primary filled button with glow shadow

collection_add.title: Hefte hinzufügen
collection_add.description: Browse a series and quickly add issues to collection. Optimized for fast batch adding.

sections.description: Large card buttons for each available series with cover art, name, and issue count. Cards use glassmorphism.
After selecting a series: grid of all issue numbers. Color-coded: green=owned, purple=duplicate, amber=wanted, gray=not in collection. Tap to toggle ownership. Long press for detail view.

visual.cell_style: Rounded square with issue number centered. Uses collection_status colors.
visual.cell_animation: Spring scale + color fill animation on tap

interactions.tap: Cycles: missing → owned (Z2 default) → missing. Shows brief toast confirmation.
interactions.long_press: Opens IssueDetailSheet for full detail entry (condition, notes, photos)
interactions.batch_range: Tap first number, hold shift (desktop) or tap 'Bereich' button (mobile), tap last number → all numbers in range added

series_detail.title: Seriendetail
series_detail.description: Public series overview page. Shows all issues of a series with the user's collection status overlaid (if logged in).

sections.description: Hero section with series name, publisher, genre, status badge (laufend/abgeschlossen), total issues count. Background: blurred random cover from the series.
sections.style: Full-width, glassmorphism overlay on blurred background image, 200px height

sections.description: User's personal progress for this series. Only shown when logged in.
All issues in the series. If user is logged in, overlays show owned/wanted/duplicate status.

issue_detail.title: Heftdetail
issue_detail.description: Full-page issue detail view. Alternative to IssueDetailSheet for direct linking and SEO.

sections.description: Large cover image (left on desktop, top on mobile), issue metadata (number, title, author, date, cycle), series breadcrumb link
Status toggle, condition selector, notes, photos. Glass card container.
Shows how many collectors have this as duplicate (supply) and how many are seeking it (demand). Link to trade matching.
sections.style: Two StatsCards side by side: 'Verfügbar zum Tausch: N' and 'Gesucht von: N'

sections.description: Community comments and ratings. Star rating display + comment list + add comment form.
External link to the source wiki article. 'Mehr im Maddraxikon →' button.

trades.title: Tausch
trades.description: Trade hub with two tabs: 'Matches' (suggested trades) and 'Aktive Tausche' (ongoing trades).

empty_state.title: Noch keine Matches
empty_state.description: Markiere Hefte als 'Doppelt' oder 'Gesucht', damit wir passende Tauschpartner finden können.

tabs.label: Aktive Tausche
tabs.description: List of ongoing trades with status (proposed/accepted), partner info, and item summary. Tap to open trade detail.

trade_detail.title: Tausch-Details
trade_detail.description: Detail view of a single trade. Shows offered/requested items, status timeline, and integrated message thread.

sections.description: Status badge (vorgeschlagen/akzeptiert/abgeschlossen), partner info, created date
Two-column view: 'Du bietest' and 'Du erhältst'. Each column shows CoverCards with condition badges.
sections.layout: Side-by-side on desktop, stacked on mobile with clear visual separator

sections.description: Action buttons based on current status and user role (initiator vs responder)
Inline message thread linked to this trade. For discussing shipping details etc.

messages.title: Nachrichten
messages.description: Message inbox. Shows conversation threads grouped by partner. Split view on desktop (thread list + active thread).

layout.mobile: Thread list only. Tap thread → navigates to /messages/[id]
layout.desktop: Master-detail split: thread list (320px left panel) + active MessageThread (right)

thread_list_item.style: Glassmorphism card, highlight on hover, brand primary left border when unread

explore.title: Entdecken
explore.description: Public discovery page. Browse available series, view community stats, and find other collectors.

sections.description: Horizontal scroll of series cards with cover art collage, name, genre badge, and issue count. Tap to navigate to series detail.
sections.style: Large cards (280px wide) with glassmorphism, cover art as blurred background

sections.description: Aggregated platform statistics. Three cards in a row.
Leaderboard-style list of most active public collectors. Avatar, name, total issues, completion percentage.
Grid of most-wanted issues across the platform. Shows cover + number of seekers.

profile.title: Mein Profil
profile.description: User profile page with settings. Doubles as the public profile view when navigated via /users/[name].

sections.description: Avatar (editable), display name, member since, location. Edit button for own profile. Glassmorphism hero card.
sections.visual: Large avatar (96px) with edit overlay on hover. Brand primary gradient accent stripe at top.

sections.description: Collection progress for each series. Visible if profile is public.

tabs.label: Tauschbar
tabs.description: Public list of duplicate items available for trade

sections.description: Tabbed view of public trade/want lists. Each tab shows a CoverGrid. Shareable via direct link.
Profile settings section (only on own profile). Glass card container.

public_profile.title: Sammler-Profil
public_profile.description: Public view of a collector's profile. Shows stats and public lists if profile_public is true. 404-style empty state if profile is private.

auth_login.title: Anmelden
auth_login.description: Login page with email/password form and OAuth buttons. Centered card layout.

visual.layout: Centered glassmorphism card (max 420px) on gradient background with subtle LILLY branding
visual.background: Subtle animated gradient mesh (brand primary + accent, very slow movement)

elements: OAuth buttons: Google, GitHub (outlined style with provider icons)

auth_register.title: Registrieren
auth_register.description: Registration page. Same centered card layout as login.
elements: DSGVO consent checkbox with link to privacy policy
